title: rosa coriifolia f. subbiserrata
intro: Rosa coriifolia f. subbiserrata, also known as the Chinese rose or wild rose, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of China. This plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia f. subbiserrata include reducing fever, alleviating cough and sore throat, and treating digestive issues such as diarrhea and constipation. Herbal preparations of Rosa coriifolia f. subbiserrata can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is also used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
